title: Pure Functions, Immutability, and Data Copies
description: Repair a pricing pipeline where aliases mutate shared orders during validation. Learners cumulatively produce a pure price transformation with alias-safety tests through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Write deterministic pure functions whose outputs and failures depend only on explicit inputs.
Predict mutation through shared aliases in nested Python containers.
Return updated immutable records while preserving unchanged data and input values.
